rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear reading from image.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear reading from image.
Visually verified. GPT's '2do' is more accurate than gemini-flash's '2º' for the superscript 'o'. Gemini-flash correctly capitalized 'Die'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear reading from image.

Visually verified. The description 'Arrearagia' is selected based on image, with gemini-flash being closer. The amount £920.8.11¾ is clearly visible, matching gemini-flash's shillings value. gpt-5-mini's shillings '0' is incorrect.
Consensus on amounts. Description 'Anni praesentis' preferred from gemini-flash (no trailing dashes visible in image).
Consensus on amounts. Description 'Varia' preferred from gemini-flash (no trailing dashes visible in image).
Visually verified. Pounds amount '3787' from gemini-flash is correct; gpt-5-mini's '3707' is incorrect. This is a subtotal, indicated by the line above it in the ledger.
Consensus on amounts. Description 'Debita anni praecedentis' preferred from gemini-flash (no trailing dashes visible in image).
Consensus on amounts. Description 'Summa Receptorum' preferred from gemini-flash (no trailing dashes visible in image).
Row added from gpt-5-mini, as gemini-flash incorrectly merged 'Soluta!' with the following entry. Visually confirmed 'Soluta' is a distinct header, aligned to the left.

Visually verified description. gemini-flash's 'Dno Rectori. Schol. &c.' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's '1 Do Rectori. Schol: &c'. Amounts are consistent between both extractors and match the image.
Consensus on amounts. Description 'Ordinaria' preferred from gemini-flash (correct capitalization and no trailing dashes visible in image). Both correctly identified valid shillings.
Consensus on amounts. Description 'Varia' preferred from gemini-flash (no trailing dashes visible in image).
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear reading from image. This is a subtotal, indicated by the line above it in the ledger.

Consensus on amounts. Description 'Ex Receptis' preferred from gemini-flash (no trailing dashes visible in image). 'entry' row_type is more fitting as it's a brought-forward amount from a previous total.

Consensus on amounts. Description 'Solutis Deductis' preferred from gemini-flash (no trailing dashes visible in image). 'entry' row_type is more fitting as it's a brought-forward amount from a previous total.
Consensus on amounts. Description 'Restat Solvendum' preferred from gemini-flash (correct capitalization and no trailing dashes visible in image).
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear reading from image.
Visually verified. Description 'J. C. Jones. Rectorem' from gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini's 'Rectorum' is incorrect. 'entry' row_type is more appropriate for a signature line for an individual.
Visually verified description 'Gulm. Dalby. Subrectorem' from gemini-flash is more accurate, though gpt-5-mini correctly noted the compressed handwriting. 'entry' row_type is preferred.
Visually verified description 'Jos: Roper. Burs: Sen:' from gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini's 'Rogers' is a misread. 'entry' row_type is preferred.
Visually verified description 'Gul. Ed: Honey S.T.B.' from gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini's 'A***' is a misread, despite its well-written note about ambiguity. 'entry' row_type is preferred.

rows.description: J. B. Pave J. Burs. Jun.
rows.notes: Visually verified description 'J. B. Pave J. Burs. Jun.' from gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini's 'R. B. Paul' is a significant misread. gemini-flash's note about the 'v' in 'Pave' being ambiguous is accurate, but 'Pave' is the most plausible reading. 'entry' row_type is preferred.
Consensus on description 'J. L. Richards A.M.'. 'entry' row_type preferred from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini's note about minor flourish is accurate.
